core_principles: Fusion over Imitation: Mix legal authority with fintech precision.
Emotion First: Evoke trust, clarity, and hope.
Content is King: Every page directs a narrative.
Zoom In: Bold focus on legal details.
Negative Space: Value empty areas for breathing room.
Contrast: High contrast for readability and impact.
anti_patterns: No 'Inter everywhere' - use Manrope and Crimson Pro.
No amber/gold tones (strictly rejected by user).

accent.description: Crimson Red - Alerts, Actions, Appeal Urgency

visual_enhancers.textures: Use subtle noise overlay on solid backgrounds to prevent flatness.

buttons.primary: bg-blue-900 text-white hover:bg-blue-800 shadow-md transition-all duration-200 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-900 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 transition-all duration-200 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium
buttons.destructive: bg-red-600 text-white hover:bg-red-700 transition-all duration-200 rounded-md px-6 py-2.5 font-medium

cards.style: bg-white dark:bg-slate-900 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-xl shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-all duration-300 p-6

inputs.style: bg-white dark:bg-slate-950 border border-slate-200 dark:border-slate-800 rounded-md px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500/20 focus:border-blue-500 transition-all

layout_strategies.bento_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-6 auto-rows-[minmax(180px,auto)]

instructions_to_main_agent: PHASE 1: Update 'tailwind.config.js' and 'index.css' to reflect the Blue/White/Red palette. REMOVE all Amber/Gold references.
PHASE 2: Apply the 'Crimson Pro' font to all headings (h1-h6) and 'Manrope' to body text.
PHASE 3: Refactor the Dashboard to use the 'Bento Grid' layout defined in 'layout_strategies'.
PHASE 4: Update the Landing Page to use the 'hero_background' image with a heavy blue overlay for text readability.
PHASE 5: Ensure all buttons and interactive elements use the new color variables (primary = blue-900, accent = red-600).
CRITICAL: Do not use gradients for backgrounds unless specified. Stick to solid white/slate-50 for clean legal look.
CRITICAL: Ensure 'data-testid' attributes are present on all interactive elements.
universal_guidelines: Dark colors look good when used independently without gradients.
Create depth through layered design elements with z-index hierarchy.
Use glass-morphism effects with backdrop filters.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
